ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: `fontSize` is required to be a number.
ast.target: MUI：`fontSize` 必须是一个数字。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: `htmlFontSize` is required to be a number.
ast.target: MUI：`htmlFontSize` 必须是一个数字。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: Argument "props" must be a string or Array.
ast.target: MUI：参数 "props" 必须是字符串或数组。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: Argument "easing" must be a string.
ast.target: MUI：参数 "easing" 必须是字符串。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: Argument "delay" must be a number or a string.
ast.target: MUI：参数 "delay" 必须是数字或字符串。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: The Chip component can not handle the avatar and the icon prop at the same time. Pick one.
ast.target: MUI：Chip 组件不能同时处理 avatar 和 icon 属性。请选择一个。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: The `InputAdornment` variant infers the variant prop you do not have to provide one.
ast.target: MUI：`InputAdornment` 的 variant 会推断 variant 属性，你无需提供。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: You need to provide a value prop when using the determinate or buffer variant of LinearProgress .
ast.target: MUI：使用 LinearProgress 的 determinate 或 buffer 变体时，需要提供 value 属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: You need to provide a valueBuffer prop when using the buffer variant of LinearProgress.
ast.target: MUI：使用 LinearProgress 的 buffer 变体时，需要提供 valueBuffer 属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: You need to provide a `anchorPosition` prop when using <Popover anchorReference="anchorPosition" />.
ast.target: MUI：使用 <Popover anchorReference="anchorPosition" /> 时需要提供 `anchorPosition` 属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: <StepContent /> is only designed for use with the vertical stepper.
ast.target: MUI：<StepContent /> 仅设计用于垂直步进器。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: You can not use the `centered={true}` and `variant="scrollable"` properties at the same time on a `Tabs` component.
ast.target: MUI：不能在 `Tabs` 组件上同时使用 `centered={true}` 和 `variant="scrollable"` 属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: `children` must be passed when using the `TextField` component with `select`.
ast.target: MUI：在 `TextField` 组件上使用 `select` 时必须传入 `children`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to render markdown:
ast.target: 无法渲染 Markdown：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to change language:
ast.target: 切换语言失败：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Input a TTS URL to pronounce the single word in the card. Use %s to represent word.
ast.target: 输入一个 TTS URL 来朗读卡片中的单词。使用 %s 代表单词。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Word TTS [experiment]
ast.target: 单词 TTS [实验]

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问对象——但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这表示你的设置有问题。你在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前就访问了 t 函数。请等待回调或 Promise 完成后再访问！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: init：未使用 languageDetector 且未定义 lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: init：i18next 已初始化。你只应调用一次 init！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18next was not initialized
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace：i18next 未初始化

ast.name: warn
ast.source: You can solve the issue by sorting the options with the output of `groupBy`.
ast.target: 你可以用 `groupBy` 的输出对选项排序来解决此问题。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: MUI: You can not use the `minRows` or `maxRows` props when the input `rows` prop is set.
ast.target: MUI：当设置了输入的 `rows` 属性时，不能使用 `minRows` 或 `maxRows` 属性。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AosrPluginLoaded with debug flag
ast.target: AosrPluginLoaded 已开启调试标志

ast.name: aria-label
ast.source: pagination navigation
ast.target: 分页导航
